trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close below $357.52 (nearest support level), confirming breakdown.
confluence_signals: Price-Volume Divergence: price rising with LOW volume (weak buying)
Funding Velocity: accelerating negative (longs paying more, flush building)
Hyperliquid Smart Money: net outflow, more shorts, 0% win rate
OI Interpretation: falling OI + price falling (deleveraging/liquidations)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Four bearish signals (weak buying, accelerating negative funding velocity, smart money outflow/bearish positioning, deleveraging) indicate strong downside pressure. This aligns with a 62% win rate, despite counter-signals like Extreme Fear and 1d channel up, which are considered but outweighed by immediate market structure and flow data.
